---
title: "Claude.ai — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico v3.1"
source-title: "Claude.ai"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
from itables import init_notebook_mode
init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

from src.parsers.quarto_helpers import (
    fmt_pct, fmt_int, safe_int, show_df, show_md, plotly_bar,
    has_col, has_view, table_count, setup_notebook,
)

SOURCE_KEY     = "claude_ai"
SOURCE_TITLE   = "Claude.ai"
SOURCE_COLOR   = "#CC785C"  # Anthropic burnt orange
MUTED          = "#D1D5DB"
PROCESSED      = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "Claude.ai"
TABLES         = ["conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"]
AUX_TABLES     = ["project_metadata", "project_docs"]
ACCOUNT_FILTER = None

con = duckdb.connect()
_setup = setup_notebook(con, SOURCE_KEY, PROCESSED, TABLES, AUX_TABLES, ACCOUNT_FILTER)
```

> **Sobre Claude.ai:** parser v3.1 com gap-fill (Backlog #41 do projeto-mae
> fechado). Cobertura: branches via DAG plano, thinking blocks, tool_use/result
> com MCP detection (3 sinais), `is_starred → is_pinned`, `is_temporary`,
> `summary` auto-gerado, `settings_json`, `citations_json`, `attachments_json`
> com extracted_content inline, `start/stop_timestamp` (~98% latencia),
> projects com `project_metadata` + `project_docs` (546 docs / 23M chars).

{{< include _template.qmd >}}

{{< include _template_aux.qmd >}}
